attributes.name: [vSphere OTel] Average host disk latency below 15 ms 99.5% rolling 30 days
attributes.description: This SLO tracks the average disk I/O latency of ESXi hosts via OTel vcenterreceiver metrics. It ensures that 99.5% of 1-minute time intervals show average host disk latency below 15 milliseconds over a rolling 30-day period. High disk latency indicates storage bottlenecks from array issues, noisy-neighbor VMs, or thin-provisioning overcommit; remediation includes investigating storage array, VM I/O profiles, or network path.
